layout.title: Snowflake Loader
layout.secureLoader: Securely load and manage your Snowflake data

upload.title: Upload Center
upload.subtitle: Drag and drop your Excel or CSV safely. We'll automatically validate it before loading.
upload.dropHere: Drop your Excel or CSV file here
upload.clickOrDrag: Click or drag file to this area to upload
upload.validationPassedDesc: Found 4 columns, 0 null issues, and 0 duplicate rows detected. Safe to push to Snowflake.
upload.validationFailedDesc: Found 12 missing values in column 'Revenue'. Please fix the file and re-upload.

userDashboard.title: Your Dashboard
userDashboard.subtitle: Track your import success rates and data quality over time.

importHistory.title: Import History
importHistory.subtitle: View your past uploads, debug errors, and rollback accidental pushes.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your account details and personalization preferences.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.subtitle: Describe your issue or reclamation. Your organization administrator will be notified.
feedback.placeholder: Explain the problem and what you expected to happen...
feedback.success: Your feedback was sent to your administrator.
feedback.errorSubmit: Unable to send feedback. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.decisionError: Unable to process this account request.
notifications.replyPlaceholder: Write a reply to this user...
notifications.replyErrorSubmit: Unable to send reply. Please try again.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: System overview, active connections, and top level metrics.
admin.usersSub: Control access, assign roles, and manage limits.
admin.importsSub: View and rollback all system-wide data loads.
